subject: Lane A — Delivery
description:
Lane A — Delivery

Implement the VLM media-source contract and focused unit/regression tests. Required behavior: clip_object_key first; otherwise extract only an S3 HTTP clip_url object key; then snapshot S3 key; never select clip_path; reject Windows absolute, Unix absolute, and file:// inputs; enqueue requires eventId and source key; CLIP requires clips/ prefix; dedupe by source type/key + prompt version + model; introduce injectable MediaObjectVerifier with a test stub and production HEAD Object implementation boundary. Review all enqueue call sites so failures cannot break primary alert/WebSocket/FCM flow. Run focused tests and report changed files and commands. Coordinate conflicts through team mailbox; do not touch files outside strange_back.
title: Lane A — Delivery
objective:
Lane A — Delivery

Implement the VLM media-source contract and focused unit/regression tests. Required behavior: clip_object_key first; otherwise extract only an S3 HTTP clip_url object key; then snapshot S3 key; never select clip_path; reject Windows absolute, Unix absolute, and file:// inputs; enqueue requires eventId and source key; CLIP requires clips/ prefix; dedupe by source type/key + prompt version + model; introduce injectable MediaObjectVerifier with a test stub and production HEAD Object implementation boundary. Review all enqueue call sites so failures cannot break primary alert/WebSocket/FCM flow. Run focused tests and report changed files and commands. Coordinate conflicts through team mailbox; do not touch files outside strange_back.

completion_evidence.summary: Implemented the VLM media-source contract, verifier boundary, schema propagation, side-channel isolation, and focused regressions.

items.summary: Focused VLM, alert, and event regressions passed.
items.command: cmd.exe /d /c set CI=& gradlew.bat test --tests <six focused classes>

items.summary: Product source and test diff has no whitespace errors.

completion_evidence.notes: Full 177-test suite ran with one unrelated AuthSecurityIntegrationTest forbidden-status assertion failure.
